case_for: Hopkins has shown week-to-week volatility with a 19.3-point spike as recently as week 3, proving he retains some big-play/target upside in the right game script
case_against: The pregame consensus projection of just 0.8 points signals a severely diminished role (likely limited snaps, target competition, or an unfavorable matchup) consistent with his recent floor-scraping performances like 1.8, 1.9, and 0.8 points
